description_long: This object represents a highly stylized adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a simplified, angular body structure. The figure is depicted in a dynamic running pose, with one arm extended forward and the other back, and the legs stretched in a stride. The head is small and geometric, featuring a blocky beard and short hair, with minimal facial detail. The body and limbs are rendered in a faceted, low-polygon style, giving the figure a modern, abstract appearance. The surface is smooth and reflective, with a metallic sheen and a mix of gold and bronze tones. The overall form is slender and lightweight, emphasizing motion and energy.
description: A stylized, low-polygon adult pedestrian in a running pose with elongated limbs and a metallic gold-bronze finish. The figure has a geometric head with a beard and short hair, and a dynamic, abstract body.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the figure's face, beard, and forward-reaching arm, with the chest and upper body clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the running stride, showing the full extension of the legs and the profile of the head and torso.
description_view_2: The rear three-quarter view reveals the back, the trailing arm, and the angular structure of the limbs and torso.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the other leg's extension and the side profile of the head, with the arm swinging backward.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with no visible accessories or outerwear
attribute_hairstyle: short cropped hair with a full beard
